# GitHub repository About

Use these values in the repository **About** box on GitHub.

## Description

Local-first menu bar widget for live AI coding tool token usage, cost, and account limits. Optional multi-device sync via self-hosted hub or Cloudflare Worker.

## Website

https://github.com/atukunare/token-mate#readme

## One-line pitch

Token Mate — one live dashboard for every AI coding tool, synced across every machine.
